---
position: 1
title: Deployment
description: Deploy SurrealDB using SurrealDB Cloud or self-hosted.
source: "https://github.com/surrealdb/docs.surrealdb.com/blob/main/src/content/build/deployment/index.mdx"
---

This section details the ways you can deploy SurrealDB, either via SurrealDB Cloud or a self-hosted instance using solutions like Docker or Kubernetes.

Also note the page on [observability](observability/observability.md) which is often indispensable when deploying a project of a certain level of complexity.
